executives.name: Charlene Begley
executives.background: Ms. Begley served in various capacities at General Electric Company from 1988 to 2013, including as a Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer. She currently serves on the boards of Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. and Nasdaq, Inc.

executives.name: Frank Calderoni
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Anaplan, Inc. Director since 2012.
